content.en:
"The !!! of Immeasurable Magical Powers"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor's first reaction was this, because the breath of this power was immeasurably supernatural.

The Xuanqi Realm possessed the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and they had naturally seen the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms attack in their long years, and they were no strangers to the immeasurable supernatural powers.

For example, the Xuanqi Pavilion has a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, but it is not currently in the Xuanqi Realm.

Therefore, the Xuanxin Great Ancestor was extremely familiar with the breath of the immeasurable supernatural power.

"No, it's not really a Divine Skill of Immeasurable Powers, it can only be regarded as a rudiment, and the aura is more than a thousand times weaker!" Xuan Xin Great Ancestor reacted.

But even if it is a thousand times weaker, it is not comparable to the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage.

"Even if I resist this move head-on, I will be injured. Junshan Great Ancestor is weaker than me, and he is already in a state of heavy damage, so he can't catch this trick at all. Even if you use your hole cards to save your life, you may not be able to save your life!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor said secretly.

......

"Unstoppable!"

When Junshan Great Ancestor saw the seed power of Ye Tian's immeasurable supernatural power, he knew that he couldn't stop it, if there was no strong man to rescue him, then he would almost definitely die.

But at this moment, a ray of light covered his whole body.

"It's Big Brother's Infinite Extreme Domain Technique-Transformation Technique!"

Junshan Dazu was excited, knowing that he should have hope to save his life.

His eldest brother was the city lord of Copper Mountain City, the Great Ancestor of Copper Mountain, and he was also a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and his strength was even more powerful than him.

And the Transformation Technique, the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, is very special, as long as the Infinite Extreme Dao Domain is shrouded, the Great Ancestor of the Copper Mountain can convert other people's attacks to his own body, and it is too convenient to use it to save people.

At the same time, it is also possible to convert enemy attacks on itself to other targets.

It is precisely because of this immeasurable extreme domain technique that it is difficult for the Great Ancestor of Tongshan to be killed, so it has a great reputation among the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage, which is indirectly equivalent to having the effect of defensive invincibility.

Obviously, the Great Ancestor of Tongshan came here and performed the Transformation Technique at this critical moment to save the Great Ancestor of Junshan.

However, things were beyond Junshan Dazu's expectations.

Burst!

The sword light transformed from the seed power of the Immeasurable Divine Power Technique crossed time and space, penetrating the body of the Copper Mountain Great Ancestor in the distance, which was equivalent to breaking the Transformation Technique.

Although the sword has become much more illusory, there is still a lot of power, and it continues to stab at the Junshan Great Ancestor.

"No!"

Junshan Great Ancestor was desperate, and he didn't understand why his eldest brother had already cast the transformation technique, so why he still couldn't block this sword!

Bang!

The sword pierced through the body of the Great Ancestor of Junshan, causing his flesh and blood to explode.

Tongshan Great Ancestor immediately teleported over and forcibly condensed Junshan Great Ancestor's body, but the aura on his body was rapidly decreasing, and in a blink of an eye, it fell from the fourth stage to the third stage, and his life was still dying!

"Let's go!"

The Great Ancestor of Tongshan immediately fled with the Great Ancestor of Junshan, and as for the other high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage, they didn't care, and they didn't have time to take care of it.

......

"Even if Junshan Great Ancestor doesn't die, it is completely abolished, and his cultivation is no longer in the fourth stage, and it is estimated that he can only barely maintain it in the third stage, and his combat power is not as good as that of the powerhouses of the Infinite Blood List!" Xuanxin Great Ancestor said.

At this moment, Ye Tian continued to attack, instantly killing the three high-level immeasurable lifeforms of Copper Mountain City that blocked time and space.

The strength of these three is not weak, second only to the powerhouses of the immeasurable blood list, but in the face of Ye Tian, like ants, they were bombarded and killed with a wave of their hands.

"Who else?"

Ye Tian yelled.

The surrounding high-level immeasurable lifeforms were really suppressed, and none of them dared to step forward, and even retreated one by one.

Even the Xuanxin Great Ancestor who was in the fourth stage didn't dare to make a move at this moment.

Although he knew very well that Ye Tian's body was in a weak state, the power of burning immeasurable blood and urging the seeds of this immeasurable supernatural power would inevitably cause his body to be seriously damaged, and his combat strength was not as good as before at the moment, and he could not fight for a long time.

However, he didn't dare to bet, if Ye Tian could still cast the power of that immeasurable supernatural power seed, and even cast it many times, it would be possible to hit him hard.

Desperately with a madman, it's not worth it.

"Forget it, this mysterious Great Ancestor is gone, I don't need to fight with him!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor is gone.

And the Great Ancestors of the other forces were sure that Ye Tian had no backer behind him, otherwise they would not let Ye Tian work so hard, but they didn't dare to fight with Ye Tian either!

So, they could only watch Ye Tian return to the Ruins Stone Tower.

This battle completely started Ye Tian's reputation, although they didn't know Ye Tian's identity, but Ye Tian's fame had already resounded throughout the Xuanqi Territory.

In the end, there is a force to calculate Ye Tian's name.

At the level of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, it is difficult to calculate information, but it is still possible to calculate just a name.

And they finally deduced two words - endless!

At this point, the reputation of the Endless Great Ancestor resounded throughout the Xuanqi Territory.

......

"This battle has completely deterred many forces, they are unwilling to fight with me, this harvest alone is worth it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he began to replicate his body again.

Otherwise, the injuries of this replica body would become more and more serious, and it would be too difficult to repair, so he chose to give up directly.

It didn't take long for a new replica body to be copied.

And Ye Tian also directly dismantled this severely damaged copy body.

Since there was no interference from other forces, Ye Tian'an was cultivating in the Ruins Stone Tower, and the sooner he cultivated to the limit of the third stage, his combat power would increase a lot again.

Somewhere in the territory of Genki.

The Blood Ancestor knew Ye Tian's achievements, and he was immediately dumbfounded.

"This Endless Great Ancestor has grown too fast, and he has actually hit the Junshan Great Ancestor of the fourth stage hard!!"

The Blood Ancestor was extremely shocked.

From this point of view, Ye Tian can already be equivalent to a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform!

As for Ye Tian's statement that he burned immeasurable blood and urged the power of the immeasurable supernatural power technique seeds, causing his foundation to suffer serious permanent losses and had no hope of fourth-stage cultivation, he didn't believe it at all.

"The high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Xuanqi Realm almost don't have clones, but I dare to guarantee that the body that the Endless Ancestor is fighting is definitely a clone, and it is definitely not the main body, he won't be so stupid!"

The Blood Ancestor even felt that Ye Tian would definitely be able to condense the clone again, otherwise he would not give up this clone, otherwise the loss would be too great!

"Hahaha, if the other forces think that the Endless Great Ancestor is abolished and dare to provoke him again, then there will be a good show!"

He was going to wait for his injury to recover, and then go to Ye Tian to catch up, and by the way, there were some things that he could cooperate with.
